query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS learning_path_certificates (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  learningPathId INT NOT NULL,
  certificateNumber VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  verificationToken VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  completionDate DATE NOT NULL,
  issuedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_user_path (userId, learningPathId),
  INDEX idx_verification (verificationToken)
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS learning_path_certificates (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  learningPathId INT NOT NULL,
  certificateNumber VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  verificationToken VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  completionDate DATE NOT NULL,
  issuedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_user_path (userId, learningPathId),
  INDEX idx_verification (verificationToken)
)
